title: RC4445 T4A-NR - Payments to Non-Residents for Services Provided in Canada 2025 - Canada.ca
content:
## RC4445 T4A-NR - Payments to Non-Residents for Services Provided in Canada 2025
This guide explains how to file the T4A-NR return and how to complete the T4A-NR Summary and slips. Payments to non residents for services performed in Canada, other than in employment situations.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format rc4445-e.html PDF rc4445-25e.pdf Previous years: Standard print PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2024 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-24e.pdf) 2023 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-23e.pdf) 2022 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-22e.pdf) 2021 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-21e.pdf) 2020 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-20e.pdf) 2019 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-19e.pdf) 2018 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-18e.pdf) 2017 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-17e.pdf) 2016 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-16e.pdf) 2015 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-15e.pdf) 2014 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-14e.pdf) 2013 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-13e.pdf) 2012 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-12e.pdf) 2011 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-11e.pdf) 2010 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-10e.pdf) 2009 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-09e.pdf) 2008 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-08e.pdf) 2007 – Standard print PDF (rc4445-07e.pdf)
